scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix micro-services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix micro-services/patient-service && npm install --prefix micro-services/appointment-service && npm install --prefix micro-services/billing-service && npm install --prefix micro-frontends/provider-host-mf && npm install --prefix micro-frontends/patient-remote-mf && npm install --prefix micro-frontends/appointment-angular-remote-mf && npm install --prefix micro-frontends/billing-remote-mf
scripts.dev:services: node scripts/dev.mjs gateway patient-svc appt-svc bill-svc
scripts.dev:frontends: node scripts/dev.mjs host patient-mf appt-mf bill-mf
